subcodes.first_line: Say: Glorified art Thou, O Lord of Names and Creator of Heaven! I beseech Thee by the Leaf that hath sprung forth from the Lote-Tree of Thy knowledge and [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قل سبحانک یا مالک الاسماء و فاطر السماء اسئلک بالورقه التی نبت من سدره علمک و
subcodes.subjects: @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @prayer for nearness to God, @knowledge; recognition of God
